entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: A soil order covering 13.1% of the world area, particularly prevalent in the semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A climatic region where Alfisols cover extensive potentially arable and grazable lands.

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: A soil order that has historically received more research attention from ICRISAT than Alfisols.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region containing a significant portion of the world's Alfisols.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country containing a significant portion of the world's Alfisols.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: An international research organization focusing on semi-arid tropics.
